response.justification: Bogdan’s extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer across multiple companies and technologies demonstrates a strong fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role. His proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React aligns well with the primary stack, and his work with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq highlights relevant expertise. His open-source contributions and leadership in workshops further showcase his commitment to software craftsmanship and community engagement.
strengths: Deep experience with full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in workshops, demonstrating technical leadership and mentorship
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework specified in the job description
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework in the recent roles, though testing expertise is implied
Career gap from October 2025 to present, which may require clarification during the interview
